subcodes.first_line: These are the verses which have been sent down in truth from the dominion of glorious might, speaking forth in all things: "Open thou thine eyes!" [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: تلک آیات نزلت حینئذ بالحق من جبروت عز بهیا و ینطق فی کل شیء بان افتح عیناک
subcodes.subjects: @honesty; truthfulness; trustworthiness, @spiritual transformation, @high station of the true believer
